title: Issue with SPARQL insert
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE graph1 (s VARCHAR, property VARCHAR, value VARCHAR);

INSERT INTO graph1 SELECT s, 'http://data.linkedevents.org/def/location#businessType', 'http://data.linkedevents.org/kos/3cixty/bar' FROM graph1 WHERE property = 'http://data.linkedevents.org/def/location#businessType' AND REGEXP_LIKE(value, 'bars$', 'i') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM graph1 WHERE property = 'http://data.linkedevents.org/def/location#businessType' AND value = 'http://data.linkedevents.org/kos/3cixty/bar');
SELECT s FROM graph1 WHERE property = 'http://data.linkedevents.org/def/location#businessType' AND value = 'http://data.linkedevents.org/kos/3cixty/bar';
DELETE FROM graph1 WHERE property = 'http://data.linkedevents.org/def/location#businessType' AND value = 'http://data.linkedevents.org/kos/3cixty/bar';
key_bug_features: SPARQL INSERT with complex WHERE clause fails
